steps.title: Calculate the diameter length
steps.content: The diameter endpoints are $(2, 4)$ and $(2, 14)$. Both points have the same $x$-coordinate, so this is a vertical segment. The length is: $$14 - 4 = 10$$

steps.title: Find the radius
steps.content: The radius is half the diameter: $$r = \frac{10}{2} = 5$$
